impact: This gives the PP&D daemon a deterministic fixture-free guard that rejects broad generated extractor implementations by enforcing a 180-line physical size limit and banning dataclass usage when the extractor module is present.
summary: Add a focused one-file unittest size guard for ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements.
target_task: Task checkbox-123: Add a one-file replacement-size guard test for `ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements` proposals that rejects broad generated modules and requires the extractor implementation to stay under 180 physical lines with no dataclasses.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
